# MigrationStatus.failure(_:)

**Case**

The migration failed with an error.

## Declaration

```swift
case failure(any Error)
```

## Discussion

Inspect the associated value to retrieve the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Error] that caused migration to fail.

## Examining migration statuses

- **MigrationStatus.success**: The migration completed successfully.
